result.preview:
"Postgres query exectution error (ProgrammingError): (psycopg2.errors.UndefinedFunction) operator does not exist: text >= timestamp without time zone
LINE 8:     AND c.createddate >= (DATE '2023-09-02' - INTERVAL '4 mo...
                              ^
HINT:  No operator matches the given name and argument types. You might need to add explicit type casts.

[SQL: WITH case_core AS (
  SELECT c.id AS case_id,
         c.ownerid AS owner_id,
         c.createddate,
         c.closeddate
  FROM "Case" c
  WHERE c.closeddate IS NOT NULL
    AND c.createddate >= (DATE '2023-09-02' - INTERVAL '4 months')
), owner_assign_counts AS (
  SELECT ch.caseid__c AS case_id,
         COUNT(*) FILTER (WHERE ch.field__c = 'Owner') AS owner_assignments
  FROM casehistory__c ch
  GROUP BY ch.caseid__c
), non_transferred_cases AS (
  SELECT cc.*
  FROM case_core cc
  LEFT JOIN owner_assign_counts oac ON oac.case_id = cc.case_id
  WHERE COALESCE(oac.owner_assignments,0) <= 1
), agent_case_counts_all AS (
  -- count cases that involved an agent either as initial owner (from Case.ownerid) or as new owner in history
  SELECT owner_id AS agent_id, COUNT(DISTINCT case_id) AS cases_involved
  FROM (
    SELECT c.id AS case_id, c.ownerid AS owner_id
    FROM "Case" c
    WHERE c.createddate >= (DATE '2023-09-02' - INTERVAL '4 months')
    UNION ALL
    SELECT ch.caseid__c AS case_id, ch.newvalue__c AS owner_id
    FROM casehistory__c ch
    JOIN "Case" c ON c.id = ch.caseid__c
    WHERE ch.field__c = 'Owner'
      AND c.createddate >= (DATE '2023-09-02' - INTERVAL '4 months')
  ) x
  WHERE owner_id IS NOT NULL
  GROUP BY owner_id
), agent_aht AS (
  SELECT ntc.owner_id AS agent_id,
         AVG(EXTRACT(EPOCH FROM (ntc.closeddate - ntc.createddate))) AS avg_handle_seconds,
         COUNT(*) AS cases_count_for_aht
  FROM non_transferred_cases ntc
  GROUP BY ntc.owner_id
)
SELECT a.agent_id
FROM agent_aht a
JOIN agent_case_counts_all acc ON acc.agent_id = a.agent_id
WHERE acc.cases_involved > 1
ORDER BY a.avg_handle_seconds ASC
LIMIT 1;]
(Background on this error at: https://sqlalche.me/e/20/f405)"

args.query:
WITH case_core AS (
  SELECT c.id AS case_id,
         c.ownerid AS owner_id,
         c.createddate,
         c.closeddate
  FROM "Case" c
  WHERE c.closeddate IS NOT NULL
    AND c.createddate >= (DATE '2023-09-02' - INTERVAL '4 months')
), owner_assign_counts AS (
  SELECT ch.caseid__c AS case_id,
         COUNT(*) FILTER (WHERE ch.field__c = 'Owner') AS owner_assignments
  FROM casehistory__c ch
  GROUP BY ch.caseid__c
), non_transferred_cases AS (
  SELECT cc.*
  FROM case_core cc
  LEFT JOIN owner_assign_counts oac ON oac.case_id = cc.case_id
  WHERE COALESCE(oac.owner_assignments,0) <= 1
), agent_case_counts_all AS (
  -- count cases that involved an agent either as initial owner (from Case.ownerid) or as new owner in history
  SELECT owner_id AS agent_id, COUNT(DISTINCT case_id) AS cases_involved
  FROM (
    SELECT c.id AS case_id, c.ownerid AS owner_id
    FROM "Case" c
    WHERE c.createddate >= (DATE '2023-09-02' - INTERVAL '4 months')
    UNION ALL
    SELECT ch.caseid__c AS case_id, ch.newvalue__c AS owner_id
    FROM casehistory__c ch
    JOIN "Case" c ON c.id = ch.caseid__c
    WHERE ch.field__c = 'Owner'
      AND c.createddate >= (DATE '2023-09-02' - INTERVAL '4 months')
  ) x
  WHERE owner_id IS NOT NULL
  GROUP BY owner_id
), agent_aht AS (
  SELECT ntc.owner_id AS agent_id,
         AVG(EXTRACT(EPOCH FROM (ntc.closeddate - ntc.createddate))) AS avg_handle_seconds,
         COUNT(*) AS cases_count_for_aht
  FROM non_transferred_cases ntc
  GROUP BY ntc.owner_id
)
SELECT a.agent_id
FROM agent_aht a
JOIN agent_case_counts_all acc ON acc.agent_id = a.agent_id
WHERE acc.cases_involved > 1
ORDER BY a.avg_handle_seconds ASC
LIMIT 1;

exec_args.sql:
WITH case_core AS (
  SELECT c.id AS case_id,
         c.ownerid AS owner_id,
         c.createddate,
         c.closeddate
  FROM "Case" c
  WHERE c.closeddate IS NOT NULL
    AND c.createddate >= (DATE '2023-09-02' - INTERVAL '4 months')
), owner_assign_counts AS (
  SELECT ch.caseid__c AS case_id,
         COUNT(*) FILTER (WHERE ch.field__c = 'Owner') AS owner_assignments
  FROM casehistory__c ch
  GROUP BY ch.caseid__c
), non_transferred_cases AS (
  SELECT cc.*
  FROM case_core cc
  LEFT JOIN owner_assign_counts oac ON oac.case_id = cc.case_id
  WHERE COALESCE(oac.owner_assignments,0) <= 1
), agent_case_counts_all AS (
  -- count cases that involved an agent either as initial owner (from Case.ownerid) or as new owner in history
  SELECT owner_id AS agent_id, COUNT(DISTINCT case_id) AS cases_involved
  FROM (
    SELECT c.id AS case_id, c.ownerid AS owner_id
    FROM "Case" c
    WHERE c.createddate >= (DATE '2023-09-02' - INTERVAL '4 months')
    UNION ALL
    SELECT ch.caseid__c AS case_id, ch.newvalue__c AS owner_id
    FROM casehistory__c ch
    JOIN "Case" c ON c.id = ch.caseid__c
    WHERE ch.field__c = 'Owner'
      AND c.createddate >= (DATE '2023-09-02' - INTERVAL '4 months')
  ) x
  WHERE owner_id IS NOT NULL
  GROUP BY owner_id
), agent_aht AS (
  SELECT ntc.owner_id AS agent_id,
         AVG(EXTRACT(EPOCH FROM (ntc.closeddate - ntc.createddate))) AS avg_handle_seconds,
         COUNT(*) AS cases_count_for_aht
  FROM non_transferred_cases ntc
  GROUP BY ntc.owner_id
)
SELECT a.agent_id
FROM agent_aht a
JOIN agent_case_counts_all acc ON acc.agent_id = a.agent_id
WHERE acc.cases_involved > 1
ORDER BY a.avg_handle_seconds ASC
LIMIT 1;

args.query:
WITH params AS (
  SELECT (TIMESTAMP '2023-09-02' - INTERVAL '4 months') AS start_ts
), case_core AS (
  SELECT c.id AS case_id,
         c.ownerid AS owner_id,
         c.createddate::timestamp AS created_ts,
         c.closeddate::timestamp AS closed_ts
  FROM "Case" c, params p
  WHERE c.closeddate IS NOT NULL
    AND c.createddate::timestamp >= p.start_ts
), owner_assign_counts AS (
  SELECT ch.caseid__c AS case_id,
         COUNT(*) FILTER (WHERE ch.field__c = 'Owner') AS owner_assignments
  FROM casehistory__c ch
  GROUP BY ch.caseid__c
), non_transferred_cases AS (
  SELECT cc.case_id, cc.owner_id, cc.created_ts, cc.closed_ts
  FROM case_core cc
  LEFT JOIN owner_assign_counts oac ON oac.case_id = cc.case_id
  WHERE COALESCE(oac.owner_assignments,0) <= 1
), agent_case_counts_all AS (
  SELECT owner_id AS agent_id, COUNT(DISTINCT case_id) AS cases_involved
  FROM (
    SELECT c.id AS case_id, c.ownerid AS owner_id
    FROM "Case" c, params p
    WHERE c.createddate::timestamp >= p.start_ts
    UNION ALL
    SELECT ch.caseid__c AS case_id, ch.newvalue__c AS owner_id
    FROM casehistory__c ch
    JOIN "Case" c ON c.id = ch.caseid__c
    JOIN params p ON TRUE
    WHERE ch.field__c = 'Owner'
      AND c.createddate::timestamp >= p.start_ts
  ) x
  WHERE owner_id IS NOT NULL
  GROUP BY owner_id
), agent_aht AS (
  SELECT ntc.owner_id AS agent_id,
         AVG(EXTRACT(EPOCH FROM (ntc.closed_ts - ntc.created_ts))) AS avg_handle_seconds
  FROM non_transferred_cases ntc
  GROUP BY ntc.owner_id
)
SELECT a.agent_id
FROM agent_aht a
JOIN agent_case_counts_all acc ON acc.agent_id = a.agent_id
WHERE acc.cases_involved > 1
ORDER BY a.avg_handle_seconds ASC NULLS LAST
LIMIT 1;

WITH params AS (
  SELECT (TIMESTAMP '2023-09-02' - INTERVAL '4 months') AS start_ts
), case_core AS (
  SELECT c.id AS case_id,
         c.ownerid AS owner_id,
         c.createddate::timestamp AS created_ts,
         c.closeddate::timestamp AS closed_ts
  FROM "Case" c, params p
  WHERE c.closeddate IS NOT NULL

  SELECT ch.caseid__c AS case_id,
         COUNT(*) FILTER (WHERE ch.field__c = 'Owner') AS owner_assignments
  FROM casehistory__c ch

  SELECT cc.case_id, cc.owner_id, cc.created_ts, cc.closed_ts
  FROM case_core cc
  LEFT JOIN owner_assign_counts oac ON oac.case_id = cc.case_id
  WHERE COALESCE(oac.owner_assignments,0) <= 1

  SELECT owner_id AS agent_id, COUNT(DISTINCT case_id) AS cases_involved
  FROM (
    SELECT c.id AS case_id, c.ownerid AS owner_id
    FROM "Case" c, params p
    WHERE c.createddate::timestamp >= p.start_ts
    UNION ALL
    SELECT ch.caseid__c AS case_id, ch.newvalue__c AS owner_id
    FROM casehistory__c ch
    JOIN "Case" c ON c.id = ch.caseid__c
    JOIN params p ON TRUE
    WHERE ch.field__c = 'Owner'
      AND c.createddate::timestamp >= p.start_ts
  ) x
  WHERE owner_id IS NOT NULL
  GROUP BY owner_id
), agent_aht AS (
  SELECT ntc.owner_id AS agent_id,
         AVG(EXTRACT(EPOCH FROM (ntc.closed_ts - ntc.created_ts))) AS avg_handle_seconds

JOIN agent_case_counts_all acc ON acc.agent_id = a.agent_id
